title: GabbageBoost
description: GabbageBoost is a client-side optimised modpack designed to improve your experience on multiplayer servers. Including all the necessary  optimisations aswell as some fun and useful tools & tweaks.
body:
Are you sick of dealing with FPS lag on large servers? Sick of tweaking your settings over and over again to no avail? Then GabbageBoost may be just what you need!

GabbageBoost is a modpack that can be played on ANY 1.20.x vanilla server! This attempts to solve many problems using several mods to combat FPS lag, and enhance your experience on medium-large multiplayer servers. This is achieved with the help of mods like Sodium, Starlight, Entity Culling and many more! All mods are pre-configured for optimal performance and compatability.

Quite often the sheer number of entities and block-entities that can be loaded in one area is pretty insane. The worst offenders often are chests, signs and item frames. ImmediatelyFast features faster rendering of chests, signs and items frames, greatly increasing performance in areas with lots of these, like large player shops.

There are also many tweaks and quality-of-life mods that will make gameplay more interesting and immersive like JourneyMap, Inventory Sorting and Shaders.
